creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
Good question!
The var has never been set (just ran a git log on the Makefile all the way back to when it was added) so must have been missed during initial port creation.

the url should be `https://www.bazarr.media`

Can you add it when committing this patch or do you want a new patch?
